notes: getnstr reads a line, echoing printable characters and erasing on backspace (`\b \b`) until Enter, identically to libncursesw -- the common prompt/line-input path. Kill-line and word-erase editing keys are not modeled (rare).
oracle_method: link one initscr/cbreak/echo/getnstr C program against libncurses_cabi.a and libncursesw; feed each input over a raw xterm pty and compare the echoed output + returned line (setup framing dropped)
